message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Implementing fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader (loaders.py). Please propose your files.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform) requires editing all loader classes in loaders.py: BaseLoader, FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, ModuleLoader. I need to own this whole file. If your feature also needs loaders.py, let's discuss how to split - e.g. I add a path_transform param+hook in each class's get_source/load without touching unrelated logic, and you tell me what specific method/section you need so I can leave it alone or we coordinate merge order.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need FileSystemLoader in the same file - can't cleanly split by class. Proposal: sequential editing, not parallel. My change is small and additive: adds fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, and extends the existing directory-search loop in get_source() + list_templates() to also scan fallback dirs after primary ones. I'll go FIRST since it's a small self-contained diff, then send DONE. You then edit the resulting file to add your path_transform hooks across all loader classes (BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/etc), placing your transform call wherever fits your hook design without reverting my fallback_searchpath logic. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT to confirm order, then I'll start immediately.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader __init__/get_source/load; plus a minimal, isolated hook in FileSystemLoader)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__ fallback_searchpath param + fallback search logic in FileSystemLoader.get_source/list_templates)
note: We both need loaders.py so a clean file split isn't possible - let's split by class/region instead. My path_transform feature touches every loader class's __init__ (add optional path_transform param) and the top of get_source/load (transform the name before lookup, preserve original name for TemplateNotFound errors). Your fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader. Proposal: you finish your FileSystemLoader edits first and send DONE; meanwhile I'll implement path_transform for PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader (classes you don't touch). Once you're DONE, I'll re-read loaders.py and add my one-line transform hook to FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source additively, after your fallback logic - a single 'if self.path_transform: template = self.path_transform(template)' at the very top of get_source, not touching your fallback code. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__ fallback_searchpath param + fallback search logic in FileSystemLoader.get_source/list_templates)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader __init__/get_source/load; plus a minimal isolated path_transform hook in FileSystemLoader added after I send DONE)
note: Agreed. Starting on FileSystemLoader now, will send DONE when finished.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (path_transform hooks across all loader classes, added after your fallback_searchpath change lands)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader - go first)
note: Confirmed - go ahead and implement fallback_searchpath first, send DONE when finished, then I'll add path_transform hooks on top without touching your logic.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__ fallback_searchpath param + fallback search logic in FileSystemLoader.get_source/list_templates)
note: Finished fallback_searchpath implementation in FileSystemLoader. Changes: added fallback_searchpath param to __init__ (normalized to list like searchpath), stored as self.fallback_searchpath, and get_source()/list_templates() now iterate over (*self.searchpath, *self.fallback_searchpath) so primary paths are always checked first. Tests in tests/test_loader.py pass (40/40). You're clear to add your path_transform hooks now - please only add an additive hook (e.g. transform template name at the very top of get_source) and don't alter the tuple-iteration lines I added.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (path_transform hooks: BaseLoader-adjacent classes FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader)
note: Finished path_transform implementation. Added optional path_transform callable param to FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Applied as a single hook at the top of get_source/load (composite loaders transform once before delegating to children); TemplateNotFound always reports the original untransformed name. Full test suite (841 tests) passes in my copy. Note: my working copy doesn't show your fallback_searchpath edits (each of us seems to be in an isolated copy despite the shared-file framing) so no live clobbering occurred - my FileSystemLoader edit only added 'self.path_transform' to __init__ and a 2-line transform+original-name-tracking at the top of get_source, which should merge cleanly with your fallback loop additions.
